personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS Data Platform & AI/ML Pipeline Specialist

summary: Senior Python and Cloud Data Engineer with deep experience building high-volume ETL pipelines, real-time data workflows, and AI-assisted integration using FastAPI and PySpark. Skilled in GCP/AWS cloud platforms, data orchestration, and GenAI/LLM automation pipelines.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and optimized Python/PySpark ETL pipelines for telemetry ingestion from 6,000+ endpoints.
Developed real-time streaming and batch workflows in AWS S3/Glue/Redshift supporting forecasting and analytics.
Implemented GenAI Text-to-SQL agents using Claude 3 Sonnet and automated data processing pipelines.
Designed dashboards and reports using Streamlit, matplotlib, and plotly to deliver actionable insights.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Python-based monitoring pipelines with Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics and EUM integration.
Optimized ETL and data validation workflows for accurate performance analytics.
Collaborated with engineers to streamline real-time data processing and reporting.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering
Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (Glue, Athena, S3, Redshift), GCP concepts, PySpark, ETL/ELT pipelines, Data Modeling, Data Warehousing
skills.Big Data: Streaming, real-time processing, batch pipelines, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive
skills.AI/ML: GenAI, Claude Code, Text-to-SQL agents, Machine Learning libraries (scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow)
skills.Orchestration & Tools: FastAPI, Airflow, Git, Docker, CI/CD, automation pipelines

projects.name: Python Cloud Integration Pipelines
projects.description: Designed and implemented high-volume ETL and real-time pipelines using Python, PySpark, FastAPI, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP). Integrated GenAI agents for automated data processing and analytics.
